seoTitle: Somerset vs Somerset Dam — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Somerset and Somerset Dam. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Somerset vs Somerset Dam: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Somerset and Somerset Dam.
heading: Somerset vs Somerset Dam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Somerset, Queensland and Somerset Dam, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Somerset has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Somerset Dam (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Somerset or Somerset Dam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Somerset has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Somerset Dam scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Somerset scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Somerset Dam scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Somerset or Somerset Dam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Somerset has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
